task: exp_077 D2 Task-3 visual labels for tau calibration

criteria.bad: the mid-transition frames are CONTENT DESTRUCTION for a substantial run of ramp frames: (a) resemble neither source stream, (b) melt/mush/smear, (c) warp-destruction (shredded/unreadable geometry), (d) extreme zoom into unreadable texture, (e) flat-colour or graphic-pattern matte covering most of the frame, (f) near-black for many frames, or (g) effectively a cut
criteria.good: throughout the ramp the frame reads either as a source scene, or as a coherent geometric/compositional MIX of the two (wipe / split / slide / cube / grid / pinwheel / dissolve), or as a brief deliberate stylistic state (bloom/burn) that resolves
criteria.note: geometric recomposition (split-slide, cube, scaled tiling) is labelled GOOD: the scenes stay intact and identifiable, they are merely displaced. This is the class M1 cannot distinguish from destruction - see D2_AUDIT.json.

why_bad.d2_0007_tgt: rotate_scale_fade: t=23..92 is an extreme blow-up into unreadable skin/pillow texture - neither scene identifiable for ~70 frames
why_bad.d2_0008_tgt: coord-from-in: t=39..76 is shredded/smeared coordinate warp; faces torn into ribbons
why_bad.d2_0021_ref: zoomInOut: t=53..72 zooms into a flat red/skin blur - no scene content left
why_bad.d2_0002_tgt: SimpleZoomOut: t=73..82 blows out to a near-uniform green/white field
why_bad.d2_0029_ref: SimpleFlip: t=37..63 is dominated by black with thin slivers; the scene is gone for ~30 frames
why_bad.d2_0020_ref: circle: t=52..69 is ~90% flat olive-green matte (sampled bgcolor) with a small circular vignette
why_bad.d2_0027_ref: Drop_Zone_Flicker: t=51..94 is rainbow chromatic glitch destruction (also fails M2=0.805 and seam=33.2)

borderline_calls.d2_0013_ref: FilmBurn - labelled GOOD: peak bloom is near-white but the subject stays faintly visible and it resolves; a designed editorial flash, not destruction
borderline_calls.d2_0009_ref: cube - labelled GOOD: perspective cube faces on black; both scenes intact, merely displaced
borderline_calls.d2_0025_ref: squareswire - labelled GOOD: dense grid wipe, both scenes visible through the grid
